# Q2 comp count per (src,dst,port) cadence baseline (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q2 comp count per (src,dst,port) cadence baseline.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_local_ip != null and action_remote_ip != null | comp count() as conns by action_local_ip, action_remote_ip, action_remote_port | sort desc conns | limit 25
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 25). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
